EGAL Case Competition

Student Innovation Fellow — SCET

Ranked 9th out of 51 fellows in the SCET Student Innovation Fellowship — a competitive entrepreneurship program at Berkeley's Sutardja Center for Entrepreneurship & Technology.

International Protégé Competition
Opera Aria Repertoire Category · Ages 15–17
Second place in the American Protégé International Music Vocal Competition, Opera Aria Repertoire category (ages 15–17). Performed "Mein Herr Marquis" from Johann Strauss II's Die Fledermaus.

Royal Conservatory of Music Certification
Royal Conservatory of Music
Achieved Level 10 certification from the Royal Conservatory of Music — the highest level of the RCM program, representing advanced classical training and performance.

Wharton Global Youth Program
Future of the Business World · 3rd Place in final business competition
Accepted and attended Wharton Global Youth Program "Future of the Business World" the summer after 10th grade. Designed a customizable cloud product and earned 3rd place in the program's final business competition.
